title: Competitor Metric Record
description: A competitor metric is a derived record that places one product in a competitive context alongside other products. It is calculated from underlying product records, listing records, price observations, and claims.

competitor_group.description: Which competitive group this product belongs to.

product_name.description: Display name for the competitor (brand + product name).

dosage_form.description: Dosage form. Use "not_applicable" for non-pharmaceutical competitors or aggregated entries.

dose.description: Dose per unit (e.g., "500 mg", "10 mg/mL"). Use "unknown" when dose is not identified.

price.description: The most representative price for comparison.

normalized_unit_price.description: Price normalized to a standard unit (e.g., per-g, per-mL, per-tablet).

daily_cost.description: Estimated daily cost based on labeled or guideline-recommended dose.

daily_cost_assumptions.description: List of assumptions used in daily cost calculation.

claims_summary.description: Concise summary of key commercial claims for this product, or a link to the relevant commercial claim records.

claim_support_level.description: Overall evidence support for major claims.

channels.description: List of platform/channel codes where this product was observed (e.g., ["tmall", "jd", "official"]).

platform_count.description: Number of distinct platforms where the product was found.

listing_count.description: Number of listings collected for this product.

main_limitations.description: Free-text description of important limitations affecting this competitor entry.

source_ids.description: List of source IDs that contributed to this competitor metric.
